'''Tott Doneeta's starfighter''' was a one-man [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that [[Tott Doneeta]] flew it at [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] in an attempt to redeem [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]].<ref name="TOTJ6" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]
